name: Hauri AG Staffelbach
message: Hauri AG is a carpentry company based in Staffelbach, specializing in high-quality kitchens, windows, doors, bathrooms, and interior fittings. They serve clients in the Aargau and Bern regions, offering a range of services including renovations and custom woodworking.We will upload almost 100gb of corporate data soon. Detailed employee files, customer information, financials, partner informationand so on.
